title: Stabilize core startup path
goal: Fix the immediate startup instability in the core module so the application can initialize without crashing.
context: The global objective is to make the Isaac project stable.
The latest evidence indicates a crash during initialization.
Codex may use all tools available in its environment and has no time limit.
acceptance_criteria: The targeted startup crash no longer reproduces in the current repository state.
At least one relevant smoke test or targeted test passes.
No new blocking error is introduced in the same execution path.
required_evidence: Targeted test or smoke-check output summary
constraints: Work from the latest repository state only.
If blocked, report the blocker precisely instead of claiming success.
notes_for_executor: Use all relevant tools and verification steps available in the environment.
Take as much time as needed for careful implementation and validation.
